title.en: Shavuot All-Night Learning: Tikkun Leil Shavuot
title.zh: 五旬节通宵学习：修复五旬节之夜
title.he: לימוד כל הלילה בשבועות: תיקון ליל שבועות

description.en: The custom of staying up all night studying Torah on Shavuot, its kabbalistic origins, and suggested learning topics for the night.
description.zh: 在五旬节通宵学习妥拉的习俗、其卡巴拉起源以及夜晚推荐的学习主题。
description.he: המנהג של לימוד תורה כל הלילה בשבועות, מקורותיו הקבליים ונושאי לימוד מומלצים לליל.

author: Torah Light Editorial Team

header_image.description: A warm, golden study hall at midnight with open Torah scrolls, volumes of Talmud, and candles flickering as scholars bend over ancient texts. Through tall windows, the first light of dawn begins to break over Jerusalem's skyline, symbolizing the spiritual illumination gained through night-long Torah study on Shavuot.
header_image.alt_text: Midnight Torah study session on Shavuot night
header_image.suggested_style: Warm golden lighting, traditional Jewish study hall, dawn breaking over Jerusalem

related_articles: The Giving of the Torah at Sinai

chinese_dynasties: Qing Dynasty (1644-1912) - Academic traditions and collective discussion
